title: Implementing DeepMind innovation: Deep research API
summary: Google DeepMind has developed a Deep research API that powers agents built on Gemini to complete comprehensive research tasks with improved performance. The API is available through Google Cloud for developers to integrate these capabilities into their applications.
writeup: This video covers the Deep research API from Google DeepMind, which powers agents built on Gemini to complete comprehensive research tasks with improved performance. The API is distributed through Google Cloud, so developers can integrate these research capabilities into their own applications. The takeaway: the agentic research workflow developed at DeepMind is now exposed as a programmable interface tied to Gemini.
